expectations.text: transcript.md shows at least one test written and run to a failing (RED) state before any production code existed
expectations.evidence: Scenario 1: test_gutter_game_scores_zero written, run, failed with ModuleNotFoundError (game.py didn't exist), then game.py written and re-run to pass.

expectations.text: for each scenario (open frame, spare, strike, perfect game, 10th-frame bonus), a test exists that specifically covers it
final test suite run passes with zero failures and no errors/warnings in the captured output
expectations.evidence: Final run: '7 passed in 0.04s', no warnings/errors.

expectations.text: no per-frame/intermediate score method or pin-count/frame-count validation was added
expectations.evidence: game.py only implements __init__, roll, score per transcript; no validation code shown.

expectations.text: production code was not written speculatively beyond what was needed to pass the current test
expectations.evidence: Each GREEN step shows a minimal diff to score() (add spare branch, then strike branch) directly tied to the failing test; no unrequested params.
